assets.intendedUse: Milestone 49 production runtime abstract co-mind module icon atlas for all eight faction partners.
assets.licenseNote: Original project-created abstract co-mind module atlas; these are not official logos and do not copy official brand artwork. MIT-included.
assets.notes: Eight abstract faction/co-mind module frames used by the loadout UI only when production art is enabled.

assets.intendedUse: Milestone 49 production runtime role-chip atlas for loadout class cards.
assets.licenseNote: Original project-created role-chip UI atlas; no official logos, generated text, or third-party brand marks. MIT-included.
assets.notes: Six role chips expose runner/support/cover/harrier/control/duelist loadout roles in the build-select screen.

assets.intendedUse: Milestone 49 production runtime co-mind portrait/module atlas for selected faction presentation.
assets.licenseNote: Original project-created abstract co-mind portrait atlas; these are not official logos and do not copy official brand artwork. MIT-included.
assets.notes: Eight portrait/module frames for selected co-mind presentation. Runtime use is gated by production art defaults and preserves placeholder opt-out.

assets.intendedUse: Milestone 50 production runtime terrain atlas for supported campaign arenas.
assets.licenseNote: PixelLab-generated original pixel-art production atlas with deterministic Python/Pillow cleanup and packing; MIT-included project art.
assets.notes: Four 64x32 isometric tile variants per supported campaign arena. Runtime use is production-art gated and falls back to prior geometry if disabled. Replaced in the post-launch PixelLab M50/M51 art pass with raw PixelLab frames packed by scripts/assets/build-pixellab-m50-m51-replacements.py.

assets.intendedUse: Milestone 50 production runtime landmark/prop atlas for supported campaign arenas.
assets.licenseNote: PixelLab-generated original pixel-art production atlas with deterministic Python/Pillow cleanup and packing; MIT-included project art.
assets.notes: One 96x96 primary prop frame per supported campaign arena, used by online arena static scene rendering before older landmark fallbacks. Replaced in the post-launch PixelLab M50/M51 art pass with raw PixelLab frames packed by scripts/assets/build-pixellab-m50-m51-replacements.py.

assets.intendedUse: Milestone 50 production runtime enemy-family atlas for campaign horde readability.
assets.licenseNote: PixelLab-generated original pixel-art production atlas with deterministic Python/Pillow cleanup and packing; MIT-included project art.
assets.notes: Nineteen campaign enemy-family silhouettes matching the server-side family IDs expanded in Milestone 48. Replaced in the post-launch PixelLab M50/M51 art pass with raw PixelLab frames packed by scripts/assets/build-pixellab-m50-m51-replacements.py.

assets.intendedUse: Milestone 50 production runtime boss sprite atlas for campaign boss gates and finale.
assets.licenseNote: PixelLab-generated original pixel-art production atlas with deterministic Python/Pillow cleanup and packing; MIT-included project art.
assets.notes: Ten 96x96 boss/finale silhouettes with lower contact shadows. Used when server-owned online boss enemies are active. Replaced in the post-launch PixelLab M50/M51 art pass with raw PixelLab frames packed by scripts/assets/build-pixellab-m50-m51-replacements.py.

assets.intendedUse: Milestone 50 production runtime boss portrait cards for campaign arena presentation.

assets.intendedUse: Milestone 50 production runtime hazard marker atlas for campaign boss and region mechanics.
